dns_explorer.infrastructure.records_command module¶

Info

Defines RecordsCommand class implementing ICLICommand.

class dns_explorer.infrastructure.records_command.RecordsCommand(bundle: ContextBundle)[source]¶

Bases: ICLICommand

Command strategy to query and display domain DNS records.

It defines:

attributes:
_checker - Injected parameters checker (default Checker).
_reporter - Injected reporter for messaging (default Reporter).
_verbose - Injected Enable/Disable verbose option (default False).
methods:
name - Property returning name of the command.
help_text - Property returning help text of the command.
options - Property returning list of command options.
execute - Executes the subcommand actions.
__str__ - Returns the RecordsCommand as string representation.
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
_checker: IChecker¶
_reporter: IReporter¶
_verbose: bool¶
execute(params: dict[str, Any], service: IService) → dict[str, Any][source]¶

Executes the subcommand.

Parameters:

  • params (<dict[str, Any]>) – Subcommand parameters from CLI parser.

  • service (<IService>) – Command orchestrator service instance.

Returns:

<dict> containing the return code, stdout, and stderr of the command.

Return type:

<dict[str, Any]>

Exceptions:

None.

property help_text: str¶

Returns command help text.

Returns:

The command help text.

Return type:

<str>

Exceptions:

None.

property name: str¶

Returns command name.

Returns:

The command name.

Return type:

<str>

Exceptions:

None.

property options: list[CommandOption]¶

Returns command options.

Returns:

List of command options.

Return type:

<List[CommandOption]>

Exceptions:

None.
